channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A rare gold medal from the 1904 St. Louis Olympics is up for auction
item.description: A rare gold medal from the 1904 Olympics in St. Louis is being auctioned off as part of a larger collection of memorabilia from previous Games.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Two-time defending champion Sabalenka is into the fourth round at the Australian Open
item.description: It wasn’t often pretty, but two-time defending Australian Open champion Aryna Sabalenka has extended a few impressive streaks while becoming one of the first players to advance to the fourth round of the year’s opening Grand Slam tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 40 as Thunder roll past Cavaliers 134-114 in matchup of NBA leaders
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 40 points and eight assists in three quarters, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled past the Cleveland Cavaliers 134-114 on Thursday night in a matchup of teams with the best records in the NBA.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Title IX memo throws wrench in plans for schools to pay NIL money directly to athletes
item.description: The U.S. Department of Education says plans for colleges to pay athletes directly for their name, image and likeness deals would run afoul of Title IX.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells And Cheyanne Mumphrey, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: J.T. Poston goes 10 under for a 1-shot lead among the usual low scores at The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — J.T. Poston shot a 10-under 62 to take a one-stroke lead over Justin Lower in the opening round of The American Express on Thursday. Poston carded nine birdies and an eagle on the Nicklaus Tournament Course at PGA West in the Palm Springs-area desert.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Makhachev will try to win record 4th lightweight title defense when he faces Tsarukyan
item.description: Islam Makhachev said he isn't concerned with being known as the greatest lightweight of all time, but does value setting records and earning his way into the UFC Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Butler not on Heat injury report, suggesting he's expected to play Friday
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler is expected to play for Miami again Friday when it hosts the Denver Nuggets, a game that would be his first since the Heat confirmed that he wants a trade and that they are trying to accommodate that request.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State freshman star and former No. 1 recruit Jeremiah Smith lands in national championship game
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — When Ohio State faced Texas in the Cotton Bowl, Jeremiah Smith was expected to shine. After all, he had piled up 290 yards receiving in two postseason wins and was looking like the star to stop for the rest of the College Football Playoff field.
item.dc:creator: NOAH WEISKOPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WWE, TNA Wrestling announce multi-year partnership
item.description: WWE and TNA Wrestling on Thursday announced a multi-year partnership which will see wrestlers from both companies appear on each other's brands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers remains undecided on playing future with his focus on the California wildfires
item.description: Aaron Rodgers’ playing future remains undecided with the New York Jets quarterback focused on the lingering wildfires near his home in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: State Farm pulls Super Bowl commercial, shifts focus to supporting L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: State Farm has decided to pull its Super Bowl commercial and instead focus on supporting Los Angeles residents impacted by the deadly wildfires. “Our focus is firmly on providing support to the people of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: NBA great Gus Williams, who led Sonics to lone championship, dead at 71
item.description: Seattle SuperSonics great Gus Williams, who led the team to its only NBA Championship in 1979, has died. He was 71.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American tennis pro Danielle Collins thanks Australian Open fans for ‘paying my bills’ after getting heckled
item.description: American tennis pro Danielle Collins didn't let the heckling crowd at the Australian Open get the best of her during her second-round victory on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iga Swiatek moves into a 3rd-round match against Emma Raducanu at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek tends not to waste time in the first week of Grand Slams. When the five-time Grand Slam champion dispatched Rebecca Sramkova 6-0, 6-2 in a clean hour at the Australian Open on Thursday, Swiatek was living a habit of advancing quickly through the early rounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Prep roundup: Westmont breezes past Mt. Pleasant at home, Aragon, Clayton Valley take home league wins
item.description: Recaps of prep soccer and basketball from around the Bay Area, including Peninsula, East Bay and South Bay high schools. Plus, an extended recap of Westmont-Mt. Pleasant boys soccer.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Aaron Jones, George Kittle and Morgan Fox are the finalists for NFL's Salute to Service award
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Vikings running back Aaron Jones, 49ers tight end George Kittle and Chargers defensive end Morgan Fox are the finalists for the NFL’s 14th annual Salute to Service award presented by USAA.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes earn first Big 12 road win, beating TCU 73-65
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (AP) - After getting its first Big 12 Conference win on Saturday, the Runnin' Utes now have their first Big 12 winning streak. Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Keanu Dawes added 16 and Utah never trailed in a 73-65 victory over TCU on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patrick Fishburn nearly wins first PGA Tour event
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Former BYU star Patrick Fishburn had visions of winning his first PGA Tour event. He was leading after two rounds, and one shot back after three rounds before ending up tied for sixth.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Collier takes a tumble, then hits game-winning shot
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Rookie Isaiah Collier drove for the go-ahead layup with 2 seconds left to lift the Utah Jazz to a 112-111 overtime victory over the Brooklyn Nets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hyman scores in 3rd period as the Oilers rally past the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: Zach Hyman scored a tiebreaking power-play goal in the third period, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
